---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature, tower, enemy, challenge, or quality-of-life improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like to see?**
A clear description of the feature or change.

**Why does it matter?**
What problem does this solve, or what makes the game more fun?

**Proposed design (optional)**
If you have specifics in mind — numbers, art direction, controls — list them here.

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you thought about.
